title: Media B-Roll
description: Download Sandia Labs footage to help tell your story. Usage Footage is supplied for the sole use of media outlets for the purpose of news story illustration. Use by any other entity for any other purpose is prohibited without written permission of Sandia National Laboratories, which will consider each request on a case-by-case basis. Download […]
text: Footage is supplied for the sole use of media outlets for the purpose of news story illustration. Use by any other entity for any other purpose is prohibited without written permission of Sandia National Laboratories, which will consider each request on a case-by-case basis.
